message:
feat(core): implement credential content hashing for change detection (bd-zbj)

Add credential hashing module for detecting account switches vs token refreshes:

Types:
- CredentialHasher: Main hasher for credential files/content
- CredentialHashes: Contains identity_hash and content_hash
- IdentityFields: Extracted email, user_id, organization, account_name
- ChangeType: NoChange, TokenRefresh, AccountSwitch, Created, Deleted

Features:
- SHA-256 based identity hashing on stable fields
- Content hashing excluding volatile fields (tokens, timestamps)
- JWT claims extraction from id_token for identity
- Combined hash format "identity:content" for storage
- Provider-agnostic field extraction (multiple key names)

The identity hash remains stable across token refreshes but changes
on account switches, enabling accurate change detection for the
multi-account daemon.

Tests: 15 comprehensive unit tests covering all scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,6 +57,11 @@ regex = "1.11"
 futures = "0.3.31"
 rusqlite = "0.38.0"
 
+# Cryptography for credential hashing
+sha2 = "0.10"
+hex = "0.4"
+base64 = "0.22"
+
 # Test utilities (optional)
 tempfile = { version = "3.15", optional = true }
